item.title: JKHeadley/instar
item.description: Persistent Claude Code agents with scheduling, sessions, memory, and Telegram.

item.description: Soup turns the pain of LLM fine-tuning into a simple workflow. One config, one command, done.

item.title: abhinaykrupa/cowork-to-code-bridge
item.description: Let Claude run code on your real machine — safely — from any Claude chat. Bridges Claude Cowork to Claude Code on your Mac/Linux box. One command, idempotent, no open ports.

item.title: MCP-Audit/MCTS
item.description: MCTS (Model Context Threat Scanner) is a local-first security scanner for MCP servers -- static and live tool discovery, multiple analyzers, auditable risk scores, and JSON, SARIF, and HTML output. Fo

item.title: pmady/keda-gpu-scaler
item.description: KEDA External gRPC Scaler for GPU workloads - native NVML metrics via DaemonSet, no Prometheus required

item.title: Djtony707/TITAN
item.description: Building TITAN — the open-source AI operating system for trusted autonomous work: agents, tools, memory, approvals, receipts, voice, mission control, and SOMA. npm i -g titan-agent

item.title: shisa-ai/shisad
item.description: Security-first AI agent daemon — the model proposes actions, the runtime decides what execute

item.title: riceissa/aiwatch
item.description: Website to track people, organizations, and products (tools, websites, etc.) in AI safety

item.title: martymcenroe/AssemblyZero
item.description: Parameterized multi-agent orchestration framework for Claude Code and Gemini

item.title: gantasmo/theDAW
item.description: Full-featured DAW, DJ, and VJ app interoperable w/Ableton, Reaper, Resolume & more. Stable Audio 3, Magenta RT2, Suno API, Chimera track fusion, Demucs stems, MIDI generate/notate, img > spectrogram >

item.title: dunetrace/dunetrace
item.description: Real-time monitoring of production AI agents. No raw content transmitted.

item.title: ohdearquant/lattice
item.description: Run, quantize, and fine-tune LLMs on Apple Silicon. Pure Rust, no Python, no CUDA, no ONNX

item.title: kalyan-1845/lexicon
item.description: 📚 Lexicon AI — Agentic Research Workspace. Multi-agent literature intelligence powered by Next.js, FastAPI, ChromaDB, and CrewAI.

item.description: SWARM: System-Wide Assessment of Risk in Multi-agent systems

item.title: yaalalabs/agent-kernel
item.description: The Operating System for Scalable Enterprise AI Agents - Run, orchestrate, and deploy Compliant Enterprise AI Agents at scale across frameworks, without lock-in, rewrites or fragile glue code. Native

item.title: Firma-AI/openfirma
item.description: Runtime enforcement boundary for AI agents: a local sidecar that gates every outbound call against Cedar policies you own. Deterministic, call-level, no model on the hot path

item.title: OWASP/www-project-agent-memory-guard
item.description: OWASP Foundation web repository

item.title: MeshAddicts/meshinfo
item.description: Realtime web UI to run against a Meshtastic regional or private mesh network.

item.title: kaito-project/airunway
item.description: ✈️ Kubernetes-native platform for deploying and managing AI inference across multiple providers

item.title: halo-dev/plugin-ai-foundation
item.description: Halo 官方 AI 能力平台，统一接入主流大模型，为插件生态提供文本生成、嵌入向量、工具调用等智能化能力。

item.title: Enping-Hu/minimind-deep-dive
item.description: 逐行对照 MiniMind 源码精读、并延伸到大模型技术体系的中文学习笔记 —— 预训练 / SFT / DPO / PPO / GRPO、训练机制、MiniMind2→3 版本对照、真实实验证据。

item.title: icssw-org/MeshCom-Firmware
item.description: MeshCom Client 4.0

item.title: kevin333353/jobsmith
item.description: 針對台灣求職市場的開源多代理 AI 求職 co-pilot：自動找職缺、履歷健檢、一鍵產生客製投遞包（履歷・求職信・面試準備・公司情報）與模擬面試。本機 Claude Code／Codex CLI 免 API key，也可自備金鑰接 OpenAI 相容模型。

item.title: leprachuan/Wee-Orchestrator
item.description: 🍀 Self-hosted multi-agent AI orchestrator — chat with Claude, Gemini & Copilot CLI from Telegram, WebEx, or browser. 5 runtimes, 17+ models, task scheduling, skill plugins.

item.title: cybergis/rs-embed
item.description: One line code to get any remote sensing foundation model embeddings for any place and any time

item.title: rhein1/agoragentic-integrations
item.description: Drop-in adapters connecting 50+ agent frameworks (LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents, MCP, A2A, x402) to the Agoragentic marketplace: route a task with execute(), get a receipt, settle in USDC
